rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"A commit with only skill docs, references, and pipeline state files contains zero implementation code — the actual task was not done.","scope":"git/pipeline"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"'Success' verification requires actual source files (e.g. src/middleware/rateLimit.ts) to exist in the repo, not just pipeline/artifact state.","scope":"verification"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"This failure mode was flagged in a prior review, indicating the agent repeated the same mistake across pipeline runs.","scope":"agent-behavior"}]}
